## Summary
Successfully renamed all occurrences of `plan_backend` to `pr_backend` in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/learn/tracking.py`:
1. **Line 24**: Parameter name in function signature - `plan_backend: ManagedPrBackend` → `pr_backend: ManagedPrBackend`
2. **Line 38**: Docstring (Args section) - `plan_backend: ManagedPrBackend for posting the comment` → `pr_backend: ManagedPrBackend for posting the comment`
